name: agent-builder-studio
description: Agent Builder Studio: one app to design, run, and package local-first agent graphs. Spec is the single source of truth; canvas + package output are rebuildable projections.

scripts.test:studio: cd apps/agent-studio && npm run test:roundtrip && npm run test:no-hardcoded-storage && npm run test:doc-ingest && npm run test:models-filter && npm run test:schema && npm run test:full-package
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:agent-builder && npm run test:chief-of-staff && npm run test:studio
scripts.test:live: npm run test && npm run test:studio:live
